rules: H1 (Dashboard Title): text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900
H2 (Card/Widget Heading): text-base sm:text-lg font-medium text-slate-800
Overlines / Labels: Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.05em], text-slate-500 font-medium
Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use standard system sans or install Outfit/Manrope if preferred.
No full-screen gradients. Use flat, clean colors.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Slate gives a cool, professional tint.
For interactive elements (buttons), explicitly set hover text color to ensure contrast.
DO NOT use teal green or teal blue for dashboards.

spacing_system: Use generous spacing: p-6 inside KPI cards.
Gap between widgets: gap-4 or gap-6.
Dashboard container padding: max-w-7xl mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8.
structure: Top Header: Dashboard Title (Left) + Actions (Right: 'Load Sample Data' button).
Row 2: Churn Trend Chart (col-span-full lg:col-span-2) + CSV Upload Zone / Summary (col-span-full lg:col-span-1).

kpi_cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), rounded-xl, p-5 bg-white shadow-sm

buttons.style: Rounded-lg font-medium px-4 py-2 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:ring-slate-200

table.style: Clean borders (border-collapse), left-aligned text, w-full text-sm
table.headers: Uppercase, text-xs tracking-wider text-slate-500 bg-slate-50 py-3 px-4 border-y border-slate-200 font-medium

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

file_upload.style: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-xl p-8 text-center hover:border-indigo-400 hover:bg-indigo-50/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer bg-white
file_upload.icon: Lucide UploadCloud, size 32, text-indigo-500 mx-auto mb-4

chart.style: AreaChart or LineChart. Clean grid lines (stroke-dasharray 3 3, stroke slate-100). Custom tooltip with rounded borders and shadow. Line color: Indigo-500 (Retention), Rose-500 (Churn).

rules: Hover states on all interactive elements (buttons, rows, cards, upload zone).
Simple fade-in for empty states replacing content.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-csv-btn', data-testid='load-sample-btn', data-testid='kpi-card').
Add aria-labels to chart containers and empty state illustrations.

visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for clean, consistent line icons (UploadCloud, Users, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight, AlertCircle).
visual_enhancers.empty_state: When no data is loaded, show a prominent central upload zone with an icon, descriptive text, and a 'Load Sample Data' button to instantly populate the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page React dashboard using Tailwind CSS.
Implement a mock data generator or a 'Load Sample Data' button that populates the state instantly (vital for resume/interview demos).
Render 4 KPI cards: Total Customers, Churn Rate (%), Retention Rate (%), At-Risk Customers.
Render a Chart (Recharts) showing monthly churn vs retention trends.
Render a Customer Data Table with columns: ID, Name, Last Active, MRR, Risk Score (Low/Medium/High badge).
Create a clean empty state before data is loaded.
Ensure the design feels like a premium SaaS product (e.g., Stripe or Vercel style) - crisp borders, soft shadows, plenty of whitespace.
DO NOT use generic centered text alignment for the main layout.
Include data-testid attributes on key elements for automated testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this by focusing on optical alignment and refined spacing.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and subtle shadows.
Do NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform).
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Use modern button styles with interaction animations (hover lift).
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts if notification feedback is needed.
